name: Dream Puppy Spot The Differences
description: Welcome to a world full of adorable puppy adventures! From football matches and magic shows to music, art, and many more fun scenes, every level hides clever differences waiting to be found. Look closely, spot them all, and enjoy a relaxing puzzle experience that is easy to play and hard to put down.
instructions: Use a mouse or touch controls to tap each hidden difference between the two puppy pictures Find all the differences before the timer runs out to complete the level
